note: Explorer TX detail row reorder: previous tx now sits directly below txid (instead of below the capsule block). New row order: next tx → txid → previous tx → block → type → payment → change → fee → inputs → outputs → capsule → capsule text. Both navigation links are now adjacent to the identifier they reference, so the user does not have to scan past the body of a transaction to find the previous-direction step. Applied identically to renderIndexedTx and renderFallbackTx. NO consensus, NO RPC schema, NO node, NO miner, NO transaction wire format. Pure presentation tweak.
